diagnostics.title: NUMA-Unfriendly Shared Structure
diagnostics.hardwareReasoning: Struct 'ThreadIdentity' (352B, 6 cache lines) with 7 mutable field(s) and thread-escape evidence. On multi-socket systems, at least one socket accesses this structure via remote NUMA interconnect. Each remote cache line fetch adds ~100-300ns. Atomic operations on remote lines require interconnect round-trip. [Assumes: deployment target is multi-socket NUMA; single-socket systems are unaffected]
diagnostics.mitigation: Use numa_alloc_onnode() or mbind() for NUMA-aware placement. Replicate structure per-socket with periodic synchronization. Split into read-mostly (replicated) and write-heavy (local) parts. Consider interleaved allocation for balanced access patterns.
escalations: Contains atomic fields: cross-socket atomic RMW incurs interconnect round-trip (~200-400ns on QPI/UPI)
numa-topology: allocated by arbitrary thread, unpredictable NUMA placement
